description: Bill of lading shows a different port of loading than the LC

expected_issues.description: Bill of lading port of loading differs from the LC

false_positive_checks.description: The umbrella transport article should stay suppressed when UCP600-20D is the actionable child rule.
Port of discharge crossdoc mismatch should not fire on a loading-port-only discrepancy.
Insurance originals rule should not leak into a clean transport-only discrepancy.
Legacy crossdoc loading-port mismatch should stay suppressed when UCP600-20D is the specific live finding.
LC type uncertainty should not surface once a real documentary discrepancy is already present.
